questions.prompt: Enabling Microsoft Entra group sync in Printix requires an account with the Global Administrator role in the customer's Microsoft Entra ID.
questions.explanation: Documented prerequisite for synchronising groups. A non-Global-Admin account will hit the 'Could not verify group synchronization' error.

questions.prompt: If a customer's Microsoft Entra group contains other groups (nested membership), Printix flattens those nested groups during sync.
questions.explanation: Printix's documentation says nested groups are not supported. Only direct members of the synced group are picked up. Customers using nested-group structures need to flatten them or use the leaf groups directly.
